{{CargoRelic
|name=Pet Ball
|class_id=20041
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source= Fully defeat Ratman
|description=This pocket ball can house any creature, from a Firedragon weighing several hundred tons to a tiny ant. There's no logical scientific explanation for this. The only thing possible is that this is a magical ball that has an entire dimension inside!
|fame=28
|art=15
|fth=16
|civ=20
|tech=11
|ss1=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +6<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
